# CPM Conversion Report — Enterprise.slnx

## 1. Conversion Overview

| Item | Detail |
|------|--------|
| **Scope** | `advanced-multi-complexity/Enterprise.slnx` |
| **Projects converted** | 5 (Web, Api, Core, Legacy, Tests) |
| **Packages centralized** | 7 unique packages |
| **MSBuild properties inlined** | `$(BlobsVersion)` → `12.24.0`, `$(HostingVersion)` → `8.0.1` |
| **Properties removed from** | `Directory.Build.props` |
| **Shared props updated** | `Common.props` (Microsoft.Extensions.Logging) |
| **Conditional versions** | Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson (per TFM in Directory.Packages.props) |

## 2. Version Conflict Resolutions

Two version conflicts were resolved by aligning to the highest version (per user request):

### System.Text.Json

| Version | Projects |
|---------|----------|
| **10.0.1** (highest — selected) | Web, Api, Tests |
| 9.0.0 | Core |
| 8.0.5 | Legacy |

**Impact:** Core (was 9.0.0) and Legacy (was 8.0.5) now resolve 10.0.1. This is a **major version change** for both projects.

### Azure.Storage.Blobs

| Version | Projects |
|---------|----------|
| **12.24.0** (highest — selected) | Api (via `$(BlobsVersion)`) |
| 12.19.0 | Legacy |

**Impact:** Legacy (was 12.19.0) now resolves 12.24.0. This is a minor version bump within the same major version.

## 3. Package Comparison — Baseline vs. Result

### Changes

| Project | Framework | Package | Before | After | Status |
|---------|-----------|---------|--------|-------|--------|
| Core.csproj | net8.0 | System.Text.Json | 9.0.0 | 10.0.1 | Aligned to highest version |
| Legacy.csproj | net6.0 | Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.19.0 | 12.24.0 | Aligned to highest version |
| Legacy.csproj | net6.0 | System.Text.Json | 8.0.5 | 10.0.1 | Aligned to highest version |

### Unchanged (17 packages)

| Project | Framework | Package | Version |
|---------|-----------|---------|---------|
| Api.csproj | net6.0 | Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.24.0 |
| Api.csproj | net6.0 | Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson | 6.0.36 |
| Api.csproj | net6.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Api.csproj | net6.0 | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |
| Api.csproj | net8.0 | Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.24.0 |
| Api.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson | 8.0.11 |
| Api.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Api.csproj | net8.0 | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |
| Core.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting | 8.0.1 |
| Core.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Legacy.csproj | net6.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Tests.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Tests.csproj | net8.0 | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |
| Tests.csproj | net8.0 | xunit | 2.9.3 |
| Web.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Web.csproj | net8.0 | OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting | 1.15.0 |
| Web.csproj | net8.0 | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |

## 4. Risk Assessment

**[Moderate risk]** — Three packages changed versions due to alignment to the highest version. The build and restore succeeded without errors.

- **System.Text.Json 8.0.5 → 10.0.1 in Legacy** and **9.0.0 → 10.0.1 in Core**: These are major version bumps. Review System.Text.Json release notes for any breaking API changes that may affect these projects.
- **Azure.Storage.Blobs 12.19.0 → 12.24.0 in Legacy**: Minor version bump within the same major version — generally safe, but review the changelog for any behavioral changes.

Recommend running `dotnet test` to validate runtime behavior.

## 5. Follow-Up Items

1. **Run `dotnet test`** — Validate runtime behavior, especially for Core and Legacy projects which received major version bumps for System.Text.Json.
2. **Review System.Text.Json changelog** — Core moved from 9.0.0 → 10.0.1 and Legacy from 8.0.5 → 10.0.1. Check for breaking API changes in the [release notes](https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/core/whats-new/).
3. **net6.0 end-of-support** — Legacy targets net6.0 and Api multi-targets net6.0. Both produce NETSDK1138 warnings. Consider upgrading to a supported TFM.
4. **Security audit** — Run `dotnet package list --vulnerable` to check for any known security advisories on current package versions.

## 6. Artifacts and How to Use Them

| Artifact | Purpose |
|----------|---------|
| `baseline.binlog` | MSBuild binary log captured before CPM conversion |
| `after-cpm.binlog` | MSBuild binary log captured after CPM conversion |
| `baseline-packages.json` | Resolved package versions per project before conversion |
| `after-cpm-packages.json` | Resolved package versions per project after conversion |
| `convert-to-cpm.md` | This report — suitable for pull request description or team review |

Binlogs can be viewed with the [MSBuild Structured Log Viewer](https://msbuildlog.com/) for detailed build comparison and troubleshooting.

data.content:
CPM conversion complete. Here's the summary:

**What was done:**
- Created `Directory.Packages.props` with 7 centralized packages
- Updated all 5 project files + `Common.props` to remove `Version` attributes
- Inlined `$(BlobsVersion)` and `$(HostingVersion)` → removed from `Directory.Build.props`
- Used conditional `<PackageVersion>` entries for `Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson` (6.0.36 on net6.0, 8.0.11 on net8.0)

**Version changes (aligned to highest):**
| Project | Package | Before → After |
|---------|---------|----------------|
| Core | System.Text.Json | 9.0.0 → 10.0.1 |
| Legacy | System.Text.Json | 8.0.5 → 10.0.1 |
| Legacy | Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.19.0 → 12.24.0 |

All 17 other package resolutions are unchanged. Build succeeded with 0 errors. See `convert-to-cpm.md` for the full report. Recommend running `dotnet test` to validate runtime behavior given the major version bumps.
